import { useParams, useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { blogData } from "../data/blogData"; import { slugify } from "../utils/slugify"; const BlogDetails = () => { const { slug } = useParams<{ slug: string }>(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const blog = blogData.find((b) => slugify(b.title) === slug); if (!blog) { return (

404 - Blog Not Found

); } return (
{/* Header with Back Button */}
{/* Article Header */}

{blog.title}

{blog.category} {blog.date} {blog.readTime}
{/* Featured Image */}
{/* Author Info */}
{blog.author .split(" ") .map((n) => n[0]) .join("")}

{blog.author}

Business Consultant

{blog.introduction}

{/* Article Content */}
{blog.content.map((paragraph, index) => (

{paragraph}

))} {/* Blockquote */}
"The right resources can transform your business operations from good to exceptional when implemented strategically."
{/* Subheading */}

Key Takeaways

{/* Bullet Points */}
  • Identify your business's unique needs before selecting tools
  • Prioritize integration capabilities when choosing platforms
  • Allocate time for team training and adoption
  • Regularly evaluate tool effectiveness
{/* Tags */}

TAGS

{["Business", "Management", "Technology", "Strategy"].map( (tag) => ( {tag} ) )}
{/* Newsletter CTA */}

Stay updated

Subscribe to our newsletter to receive more insights like this directly to your inbox.

{/* Footer */}

© {new Date().getFullYear()} Your Company Name. All rights reserved.

); }; export default BlogDetails;
